TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fangafangasan, title = Fangafangasan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fangafangasan} }

S.FORM: alang Fangafangasan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 376 buwan, 1,013 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 22% kyan ku 222 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 78% kyan ku 791 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 18%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fangafangasan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Fangafangasan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Fangafangasan hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Fangafangasan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Fangafangasan hya' ga Cicala'ay. tay 'llaw na Fangafangasan hya' ga Kalokapuk. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Fangafangasan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Fangafangasan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 376 buwan, 1,013 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 22% kyan ku 222 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 78% kyan ku 791 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 18%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fangafangasan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Fangafangasan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Fangafangasan hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Fangafangasan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Fangafangasan hya' ga Cicala'ay. tay 'llaw na Fangafangasan hya' ga Kalokapuk. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Fangafangasan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ikekami ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, truku *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj. taj ʔllaw na *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa kalokapuk. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *aŋa*aŋas~ɕan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
